# Metrics Definition Table Template

<details>
<summary>How to use this template</summary>

- Embed this table in metrics-focused docs (`docs/metrics_discipline.md`,
  `docs/monitoring.md`, or component READMEs).
- Every metric must have at least one owner, SLO, and alert reference.
- Provide units and aggregation guidance to avoid ambiguity.
- Remove this block prior to publishing.

</details>

| Metric Name | Description | Type | Unit | Aggregation | Owner | Source | SLI/SLO | Alert |
| ----------- | ----------- | ---- | ---- | ----------- | ----- | ------ | ------- | ----- |
| | | Counter/Gauge/Histogram/Summary | | e.g., p95, max | | e.g., Prometheus query | | PagerDuty link |

## Verification Notes

- **Dashboards Updated:**
- **Alerting Rule IDs:**
- **Runbooks:**
